candidates.why: Direct COGS/cost of sales line; preferred over subtotal/duplicate total rows.

candidates.row_label: Impairment of Intangibles in Cost of Goods and Services

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Selling expense component, but sparse and likely alternate-year labeling; less complete than 'Selling and marketing expenses'.
Clear SG&A overhead component.

Headcount disclosure, not an expense row.
Headcount disclosure, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A subtotal row is present, so selected the best operating overhead components. Excluded 'Other operating income and expenses' and related rows because they include FX and other non-SG&A items.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; not suitable for XRD when looking for dedicated R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated current-period research and development expense row is visible. The only R&D-related line is supplemental amortization, which should not be used as XRD.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; primary XINT candidate.
Recurring financing cost related to leases; should be included alongside interest expense if separate.
Earnings attribution item, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Likely duplicates the lease-interest amount already shown in 'Net lease interest'; avoid double counting.
Equity line, not interest expense.

Liability balance, not expense.

variables.notes: Included recurring financing cost components and excluded 'Net financial items' / 'Other financial items' because they may contain FX and non-recurring items. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row to avoid duplication with 'Net lease interest'.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the Parent company

Preferred conceptually, but appears unusable/incomplete in the preview and does not match the reported equity amounts for most years.
Reported balance-sheet equity line; suitable fallback when owner-only equity line is not reliable.
Reported total equity line; same values as 'Equity' and useful as alternate-year priority label.

variables.notes: Used total equity labels as the reliable reported balance-sheet equity measure. 'Total Parent Equity' appears incomplete/misaligned in the preview, so it was not selected. To avoid double counting, MIB is left empty.
